name: Taboola Native Advertising & Content Discovery API
what_it_does: Taboola REST API for native advertising and content recommendation platform. Enables AI agents to manage native ad campaign creation and targeting configuration, handle creative asset management for sponsored content and native ads, access campaign performance reporting and click-through analytics, retrieve audience targeting and segment management for content discovery, manage CPC and CPA bid strategy configuration, handle publisher-side content recommendation widget management, access video and image creative performance analytics, retrieve item-level performance data for creative optimization, manage conversion tracking and pixel management, and integrate native advertising data with analytics, CRM, and marketing automation platforms.
use_cases: Managing native ad campaigns from content marketing agents
Optimizing creative performance from advertising agents
Reporting on content discovery ROI from marketing analytics agents
Targeting audiences for sponsored content from media buying agents
not_for: Search advertising without native and content discovery context
Social media advertising without open web publisher network focus
Brand safety-sensitive advertisers without content adjacency controls
best_when: A brand or agency using Taboola wants AI agents to automate native campaign management, creative optimization, audience targeting, performance reporting, and content discovery analytics.
avoid_when: BRAND SAFETY RISK: Native advertising on open web publisher network has brand safety and adjacency risk — implement content category exclusions and domain blocklists before automation. Automated creative proliferation without performance gates can waste budget on low-quality placements. Click fraud and bot traffic in native advertising require verification partners.

auth.notes: Taboola uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials. Access token per account with client ID and secret. Developer portal at developers.taboola.com. No native webhooks — polling-based report retrieval. REST API with JSON responses. Publisher API for content recommendation widget management. Advertisers API for campaign management. GitHub for sample code.

pricing.free_tier_limits: API access free for Taboola advertising clients; minimum spend applies
pricing.paid_tiers: CPC and CPA bidding; minimum campaign spend thresholds
pricing.notes: New York City, New York. Founded 2007. Public company (TBLA, NASDAQ). Native advertising and content discovery market. $1.6B+ revenue (2023). 9,000+ advertisers. Exclusive partnerships with premium publishers (CNN, NBC, USA Today). Merged with Outbrain merger failed (2020). Competes with Outbrain for native advertising market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per endpoint

known_agent_gotchas: BRAND SAFETY RISK: Open web native advertising requires domain and content category exclusion lists; automate blocklist management for brand safety compliance
Separate publisher vs. advertiser APIs — publisher widget management and advertiser campaign APIs have different endpoints and auth clients; manage separately
No webhooks — implement polling for performance data; report latency is typically 24 hours for accurate attributed data
Creative approval — new ad creatives require Taboola review before serving; build review status polling into creative automation workflow
Click quality — native advertising has click fraud risk; integrate IAS or DoubleVerify verification before attribution decisions
Content recommendation — Taboola's publisher-side content recommendation API powers on-site discovery; different product from advertiser campaign API
agent_readiness.security_notes: Native advertising. SOC2, GDPR, CCPA, IAB TCF. OAuth2. US/EU. Campaign, creative, and audience data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Native advertising. SOC2, GDPR, CCPA. OAuth2. US/EU. Campaign and content data.
